_comment: Multi-tenant configuration. Each key is a hostname, value is the tenant config.
_comment2: To add a tenant: add an entry here and redeploy. For dynamic tenants without redeploy, migrate to Cloudflare KV (see docs/M2-multi-tenant.md).
